name: sap-project
description: SAP project-delivery & operations automation for functional consultants, integration, security, release, and AMS/ops teams. Ships 40 skills covering functional/AMS operations across six lanes — incident root-cause, health checks, access & authorizations, release & transports, test data & regression (Business Partner BP, Material Master MM01/MM02/MM03, Sales Order VA01/VA02/VA03 — successor home of the former sap-tcd plugin), and config diagnosis & maintenance — plus the sap-consultant agent. Companion to sap-dev-core (install that first — its shared scripts are resolved at runtime).
